CapAlert.description: Wraps antd Alert. All antd Alert props available via spread.

afterClose.description: Trigger when animation ending of Alert

CapButton.description: Wraps antd Button. All antd Button props available via spread.
caveats: type='primary' uses the app theme color — do NOT override background-color in CSS unless theming is unavailable
Custom wrapper props: isAddBtn (adds + icon), prefix (left slot), suffix (right slot)

CapCard.description: Wraps antd Card. All antd Card props available via spread.

CapCardBox.description: Wraps antd Card. All antd Card props available via spread.

CapCarousel.description: Wraps antd Carousel. All antd Carousel props available via spread.

CapColoredTag.description: Wraps antd Tag. All antd Tag props available via spread.

CapColumn.description: Wraps antd Col. All antd Col props available via spread.
caveats: Use span prop (1–24) when inside a CapRow grid layout
Can be used standalone as a vertical flex container without span
Avoid CSS gap — use margin on children or gutter on parent CapRow instead
CapColumn.styledPattern: styled(CapColumn)`...css...` (no attrs needed for basic styling)
CapColumn.disambiguation: CapColumn = vertical stack or grid cell. CapRow = horizontal flex container. Use CapColumn when Figma layoutMode is VERTICAL.

closable.description: 是否显示右上角的关闭按钮

onCancel.description: 点击模态框右上角叉、取消按钮、Props.maskClosable 值为 true 时的遮罩层或键盘按下 Esc 时的回调

maskClosable.description: 点击蒙层是否允许关闭

CapMenu.description: Wraps antd Menu. All antd Menu props available via spread.

closable.description: 是否显示右上角的关闭按钮

onCancel.description: 点击模态框右上角叉、取消按钮、Props.maskClosable 值为 true 时的遮罩层或键盘按下 Esc 时的回调

maskClosable.description: 点击蒙层是否允许关闭

caveats: Pass footer={null} to remove default OK/Cancel buttons
Pass custom footer={<CapRow>...</CapRow>} for custom action layout
visible prop controls open/close state — must be managed by parent state
Default footer renders CapButton type='primary' (okText) and CapButton type='flat' (closeText)

CapMultiSelect.description: Wraps antd Tree. All antd Tree props available via spread.

CapMultiSelectWithTree.description: Wraps antd Tree. All antd Tree props available via spread.

CapRadioCard.description: Wraps antd Card. All antd Card props available via spread.

CapRadioGroup.description: Wraps antd Radio. All antd Radio props available via spread.

CapRow.description: Wraps antd Row. All antd Row props available via spread.
caveats: ALWAYS pass type='flex' to enable flexbox behavior (Ant Design Row default is block)
Use justify prop (not CSS justify-content) — values: 'start'|'end'|'center'|'space-around'|'space-between'
Use align prop (not CSS align-items) — values: 'top'|'middle'|'bottom'
When using styled(CapRow), forward layout props via .attrs(() => ({ type: 'flex', justify, align }))
CapRow.disambiguation: CapRow = horizontal flex container. CapColumn = vertical/grid container. Use CapRow when Figma layoutMode is HORIZONTAL.

CapSelect.description: Wraps antd Select. All antd Select props available via spread.

CapSkeleton.description: Wraps antd Skeleton. All antd Skeleton props available via spread.

CapSlider.description: Wraps antd Slider. All antd Slider props available via spread.

CapSpin.description: Wraps antd Spin. All antd Spin props available via spread.

CapSteps.description: Wraps antd Steps. All antd Steps props available via spread.

CapStepsAccordian.description: Wraps antd Collapse. All antd Collapse props available via spread.

CapSwitch.description: Wraps antd Switch. All antd Switch props available via spread.

CapTab.description: Wraps antd Tabs. All antd Tabs props available via spread.
caveats: Use panes prop (array of { key, tab, content }) — do NOT use CapTab.TabPane children
NOT to be confused with CapTable (data grid) — CapTab = tab navigation
CapTab.disambiguation: CapTab = tab navigation. CapTable = data grid. If Figma shows navigation tabs → CapTab.

CapTabV3.description: Wraps antd Tabs. All antd Tabs props available via spread.

CapTable.description: Wraps antd Table. All antd Table props available via spread.

expandedRowRender.type: (record: T, index: number, indent: number, expanded: boolean) => React.ReactNode

onChange.type: (pagination: PaginationConfig, filters: Record<keyof T, string[]>, sorter: SorterResult<T>, extra: TableCurrentDataSource<T>) => void

onRowClick.type: (record: T, index: number, event: Event) => void

caveats: Wraps antd Table. dataSource + columns are required
Use infinteScroll={true} + setPagination + loadMoreData for infinite scroll
NOT to be confused with CapTab (tabbed navigation) — CapTable = data grid
CapTable.disambiguation: CapTable = data grid with rows/columns. CapTab = tab navigation with panes. If Figma shows tabular data → CapTable.
